name: Dana Ahmed

projects.name: NTI 4-Month Scholarship, Graduation Project
projects.description: AI-based assistant that translates Arabic text from images, detects prices, recognizes historical landmarks, and provides tourist information and nearby recommendations.

projects.name: Graduation Project, Soil Analysis and Early Detection of Plant Diseases
projects.description: Developed a system for early diagnosis of plant diseases, Predicted Soil types from input images and Soil properties from satellite imagery and generated crop recommendations based on soil health and texture analysis

projects.name: Animals Classification
projects.description: Implemented a Transformer-based ViT neural network architecture from scratch to classify animals, focused on attention mechanisms and model optimization for better performance

summary: Recent Computer Science graduate specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, with hands-on experience in Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), and Computer Vision projects.
strengths: Strong focus on developing practical, data-driven solutions
Passionate about applying AI techniques to solve real-world problems
